acceptedAnswer.text: The CSRD Checker is free and does not require an account. CrowAgent Core and CrowMark are paid products with a 14-day trial.

mainEntity.name: What happens when my trial ends?

acceptedAnswer.text: At the end of the 14-day period, you can choose whether to continue on a paid plan. You are not charged during the trial itself.
